cases.notes: Pinned Script_Extensions itemization now lets the reviewed shaping route classify the vendored pre-base matra case as Deva without diagnostics; this row does not claim pre-base matra reordering or full phase evidence.
Vendored Noto Sans Devanagari shapes क्षा into a bounded single cluster covering the original UTF-16 range without promoting complete Indic support.
Vendored र्क exposes a reordered or zero-advance cluster consistent with reph-like shaping on the reviewed runtime path.
Vendored कं exposes a positioned or zero-advance mark cluster only, keeping full GPOS phase coverage as a separate gate.

remainingGates.detail: Ticket-local indic-syllable-plan or shaping-plan phase evidence is still absent; this wave does not yet serialize syllable boundaries, feature phases, or reorder decisions per fixture.
The full required Devanagari feature set, especially blwf/half/pstf/vatu/pres/haln/dist, is not yet proven by ticket-local reviewed evidence on the runtime path.
Dedicated unsupported-syllable and phase refusal fixtures plus text.shaping.indic-syllable-unsupported and text.shaping.devanagari-phase-unsupported diagnostics remain absent.
Ticket-local shaping-plan.json or indic-syllable-plan.json, gsub-trace.json, gpos-trace.json, shaped-glyph-run.json, and unicode-segments.json dump families remain open before done.
